info.title: DnsSwitch (dnss
info.description:
This `dotnet tool` is a Windows cli exe for swapping dns configurations.
      Preconfigured with several public dns options and the ability to add your own configurations or set ad hoc addresses.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: DNSS - Configure the DNS settings of an ethernet adapter. Must be run as an administrator. Pre-configured options will affect the 'first' IPv4 enabled adapter only.
